name: Download + Extract Source Material

download_all_files.detail: All 24 files downloaded from Google Drive folder 1vVnZDVlL7gfto_ZiCHYBprFHyDKX2rXt to artifacts/source-pdfs/

extract_text.detail: All 24 files extracted to markdown with YAML frontmatter in artifacts/extracted/ using pdftotext with page deduplication

create_manifest.detail: extraction-manifest.json written with complete inventory, word counts, and status for all 24 files

notes: PDFs had significant page duplication (same content repeated across pages) - deduplication applied during extraction
Used pdftotext (poppler) for extraction rather than read_file to avoid token-expensive page-by-page extraction
Google Drive download tool creates both original-name and specified-name copies; originals were cleaned up
TXT file (ALERT_INSERT_ME_prompting_file.txt) contained OAI Career Brain system prompt instructions
